text:
Created attachment 165207
patch proposal

Hi.
7e3646578b54b2efa2501b7025e79f74ae12ea0aESC commit removed t_maxopd field for SMSS matter, in favor of using tcp_maxseg function.

tcp_stacks/fastpath.c still somehow used this field, hence the patch proposes a little change to fix it.

Regards.
